## Definition

**Macronutrients** is introduced in this chapter. ---  ### keywords  atoms and atomic structure  macronutrients  chemical bonds  chemical reactions  cell structure  buffers  ## 3.1 Organization of Matter  ### 3.1.1 Matter and Elements  All things, living and non-living, consist of *matter*, defined as anything that occupies space and has mass.
